title: Concurrency-safe plugin-tree render (lock + tmp-swap)
action: scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs writeTree (lines 127-135) is rmSync-whole-dir + plain writeFileSync per file, no lock: two concurrent runs race dangerously (partial trees observable, interleaved deletes/writes). Fix: (1) wrap the render+write of both plugin trees in withStoreLock(<repoRoot>, 'plugin-render') (import from skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/lock.mjs or the vendored .bee/bin/lib copy — pick the import the script's existing style supports; it runs from repo root); (2) write each target tree into a fresh tmp sibling dir (targetRoot + '.tmp-' + random suffix), then swap: rename existing tree aside, rename tmp into place, rm the old — the observable window shrinks to two renames; sidecar written inside the tmp tree before the swap; (3) crashed-run hygiene: on startup, remove any stale '.tmp-*' sibling dirs older than a few minutes. RED evidence: a reproduction script/test spawning two concurrent renders against a fixture (or the real repo pre-fix in a temp copy) showing a torn observation (missing files mid-run or one run crashing on the other's rmSync) — capture actual failure output. Then GREEN: new scripts/test_render_race.mjs (two concurrent spawns both exit 0, final tree validates via the script's own validateWholeTree logic + sidecar present), registered in SUITES + SERIAL_SENSITIVE. Full verify green.

truths: writeTree path runs under withStoreLock('plugin-render') and writes via tmp-dir + swap; sidecar lands before swap.
test_render_race.mjs proves two concurrent renders both succeed and leave a valid tree; registered in SUITES + SERIAL_SENSITIVE.
RED evidence captured (torn/racing behavior pre-fix); render output bytes for a single run are unchanged from today (pure refactor of the write path).
prohibitions: Do NOT change what gets rendered (bytes identical for identical input).
Do NOT add a new lock name colliding with existing store locks.

trace.outcome: Concurrency-safe plugin-tree render: lock + tmp-swap, RED-reproduced (real ENOTEMPTY crash + torn tree) then fixed, full verify green
